title: Lead Revenue Manager at Rajasthan Tourism

jsonLd.title: Lead Revenue Manager at Rajasthan Tourism
jsonLd.description:
Rajasthan Tourism is actively seeking a talented and motivated Revenue Manager to join our dynamic team in Gurgaon. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Rajasthan Tourism:
Rajasthan Tourism is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Yield Management
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajasthan Tourism!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
